items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Auto-sync when connection restored', but the provided evidence does not include any details or tests that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions various features related to report creation but does not explicitly address the auto-sync capability, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence or tests demonstrating this requirement, it cannot be validated.
